author: Siliconera
text:
FFXIV G’raha Figure Is the Second Nendoroid
The G'raha Tia Nendoroid will follow the Y'shtola figure and be the second FFXIV character in this line.

author: Siliconera
text:
First Akane-banashi Banpresto Akane Osaki Figure Debuts
It looks like a Banpresto figure of Akane Osaki will end up being the first one based on the Akane-banashi heroine.

author: Siliconera
text:
Next Dissidia Duellum Final Fantasy Character Is FFX’s Tidus
The second limited time character in Dissidia Duellum Final Fantasy will be Tidus from FFX, and there will be Abilities based on Yuna and Wakka.

author: Siliconera
text:
New Love and Deepspace Valko Trailer Reveals English Voice, Story Scenes
A Love and Deepspace trailer offers a better look at Valko gameplay footage and lets us hear the sixth love interest's English voice acting.

author: Siliconera
text:
Silent Hill f Gets Fatal Frame 2 Costume DLC for Hinako
The Fatal Frame 2 Remake Mio costume DLC is now live for free for Silent Hill f players to use with Hinako.

author: Siliconera
text:
Crunchyroll Will Be the Streaming Home of Kagurabachi Anime
Crunchyroll confirmed it will be the streaming home of the Kagurabachi anime adaptation ahead of the con world tour.

author: Siliconera
text:
Baskin-Robbins Will Share Animal Crossing: New Horizons Island
The chain will publish the code at the beginning of July 2026.

author: Siliconera
text:
25th Anniversary Kingdom Hearts Kuji Includes Figures, Keychains
I need those goofy-lookin' (no pun intended) desktop figures NOW.

author: Siliconera
text:
Review: Dead or Alive 6 Last Round Is More for Newcomers
Dead or Alive 6 Last Round feels more like a reminder and accessibility update, rather than a more meaningful addition.

author: Siliconera
text:
Final Fantasy XI Celestial Nights Date Event Starts in July
Celestial Nights are back again in Final Fantasy XI, letting us help a date go well and get avatar swimsuits.

author: Siliconera
text:
Cospa Selling Naruto’s Blouson Jacket from Naruto Shippuden
Cospa is selling a replica of Naruto's jacket from Naruto Shippuden that can be used for cosplay or everyday wear.

author: Siliconera
text:
Tales of Eternia Remastered Character Art and Quotes Shared
New Tales of Eternia Remastered character art and quotes reintroduce the first four main characters in the JRPG remaster.

author: Siliconera
text:
New Danganronpa 2 Chiaki Nanami Bunny Girl Is Also 2 Feet Tall
The next extra-large Danganronpa series bunny girl figure will be of Chiaki Nanami from Danganronpa 2: Goodbye Despair.
